text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 245 

SPLMTL_HLTH_HOME_SPO 

LABEL: Beneficiary Record in Supplemental Health Home and State Plan Option (SPO) File 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there is a record in the health home (HLTH_HOME) state plan option (SPO) 
supplemental file for this person that includes health home or Community First, 1915i, 1915J, 1915a, 
1932a or 1937 SPO participation.
